dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HCON 64 IH: To direct the removal of United States Armed Forces from hostilities within or against Venezuela that have not been authorized by Congress.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. McGovern (for himself, Mr. Castro of Texas, Mr. Khanna, Ms. Jacobs, and Ms. Kamlager-Dove) submitted the following concurrent resolution; which was referred to the Committee on Foreign Affairs

form.official-title: To direct the removal of United States Armed Forces from hostilities within or against Venezuela that have not been authorized by Congress.

section.header: Removal of the use of United States forces for hostilities within or against Venezuela
section.text: Pursuant to section 5(c) of the War Powers Resolution (50 U.S.C. 1544(c)), Congress hereby directs the President to remove the use of United States Armed Forces from hostilities within or against Venezuela, unless explicitly authorized by a declaration of war or specific statutory authorization for use of military force.
